title: Akinator Clone
description: A web application that mimics the popular Akinator game, where users think of a character, and the application tries to guess it by asking a series of yes/no questions. The application uses a simple decision tree algorithm to narrow down the possibilities based on user responses. It can be implemented using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and can include a database of characters and their associated questions to improve the guessing accuracy over time.
tech: Local Storage for saving character data and user responses
Decision Tree Algorithm for guessing characters
